2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch splits the initialization logic in io_buffer_register_request() into a helper function called io_kernel_buffer_init(). This is done to prepare for supporting kernel-populated buffers in fuse io-uring, which will reuse this logic. The new helper function takes several parameters and initializes an io_mapped_ubuf structure, while the main function remains largely unchanged. This change allows for more modular code and sets the stage for future enhancements.
